response.justification: Bogdan meets the 15-year experience minimum and has recent exposure to AI infrastructure at re:cinq, but the resume lacks demonstrated expertise in AI strategy, cloud platform architecture, or customer advisory work. His background is strong in engineering craft and full-stack development, but doesn't show the specialized AI focus, strategic product vision, or recognition in AI that the director-level Principal Engineer role requires. The current AI-adjacent role is a positive signal worth exploring further, but falls short of the stated preferred qualifications.
strengths: 18+ years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems with recent AI-agent infrastructure exposure
Proven entrepreneurial mindset as GISCollective founder since 2016 and track record of technical leadership across multiple organizations
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, courses, and organized technical communities
concerns: Limited evidence of deep AI/ML expertise or demonstrated products/platforms built with AI—current role mentions MCP code generators but lacks breadth of AI strategy work
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field, and no publications, patents, or recognized thought leadership in AI or cloud platforms
No demonstrated experience advising customers or partners on cloud/AI technology adoption or defining cloud product strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI specialization and strategic vision
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq
Meets experience duration and education minimums
